summary: Addressed the security review P1 by making session verification fail closed when the configured admin auth values are missing or known placeholders, including the current .env.example SESSION_SECRET placeholder. Added regression coverage proving createAdminSessionToken rejects placeholder config and verifyAdminSessionToken rejects a forged token signed with the checked-in placeholder secret.

tests_run.result: PASS: 9 local admin auth tests passed, including placeholder-secret forged-token rejection.
PASS: Next.js production build passed; known local Windows SWC optional-native warnings were nonfatal.

changes_after_request: Added replace-with-a-random-32-plus-character-local-secret to the placeholder secret deny list.
Changed verifyAdminSessionToken() to require isAdminAuthConfigured(config), so placeholder or incomplete env values cannot verify a token.
Added tests that reject the current checked-in placeholder secret as config and reject a manually forged placeholder-signed session token.
requested_action: Re-review the P1 fail-closed fix and continue the security gate.
